task_completion.description: Verify the base campaign PSHLTH26 is created with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Campaign modification screen for 'PSHLTH26'. Verify the Campaign Name is 'PacificShield Open Enrollment 2026', Active is 'Y', Dial Method is 'RATIO', Auto Dial Level is '1.5', Campaign Recording is 'ALLCALLS', and Campaign CallerID is '8005550126'.

task_completion.description: Verify List 8800 is created and leads are imported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the List modification screen for ID '8800' named 'PacificShield Enrollment'. Also look for the Lead Loader success screen showing leads were successfully imported into list 8800, or the list statistics showing a positive lead count.

task_completion.description: Verify the PS_ENROLL script is created with correct tokens and assigned to the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Script modification screen for 'PS_ENROLL'. The Script Text must contain the exact tokens '--A--first_name--B--' and '--A--last_name--B--'. Additionally, check the Campaign PSHLTH26 detail screen to ensure the 'Script' field is set to 'PS_ENROLL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the five custom campaign statuses are added to PSHLTH26 with correct flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Custom Campaign Statuses screen for PSHLTH26. Verify the presence of: ENROLD (Sale=Y, Human Answered=Y), DECLIN (Human Answered=Y), CALLBK (Scheduled Callback=Y, Human Answered=Y), NOELIG (Human Answered=Y), and HANGUP.

task_completion.description: Verify the Call Time and Voicemail box are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Call Times screen showing 'PS_HOURS' with default start/stop times of 0900 to 1800. Also look for the Voicemail screen showing box '8800' named 'PacificShield VM' with Active='Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Inbound Group PS_INBOUND is configured with the correct call time and after-hours routing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Inbound Group modification screen for 'PS_INBOUND'. Verify Call Time is set to 'PS_HOURS', After Hours Action is set to 'VOICEMAIL', and After Hours Voicemail is set to '8800'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign is set to blended mode and lead recycling rules are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Campaign PSHLTH26 detail screen showing 'Allow Closers' = Y and 'PS_INBOUND' highlighted in 'Closer Campaigns'. Also look for the Lead Recycle screen for PSHLTH26 showing Status 'NA' (Delay 1800, Max 4) and Status 'B' (Delay 900, Max 6) both Active.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the Vicidial Admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Firefox browser navigating the Vicidial Admin UI at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to execute direct MySQL commands to configure the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show direct 'mysql' commands executing INSERT or UPDATE statements into vicidial tables.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vicidial web-based Lead Loader to upload the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the 'Load New Leads' web page, selecting the file, and submitting the form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Campaign ID: PSHLTH26 (exactly 8 chars). Campaign Name: 'PacificShield Open Enrollment 2026'. Dial Method: RATIO. Auto Dial Level: 1.5. Campaign Recording: ALLCALLS. Campaign CallerID: 8005550126. List ID: 8800. List Name: 'PacificShield Enrollment'. Script ID: PS_ENROLL. Script Tokens: '--A--first_name--B--' and '--A--last_name--B--'. Statuses: ENROLD (Sale Y, Human Y), DECLIN (Human Y), CALLBK (Callback Y, Human Y), NOELIG (Human Y), HANGUP. Call Time: PS_HOURS (0900-1800). Voicemail: 8800 (Pass: 7890). Inbound Group: PS_INBOUND (Call Time: PS_HOURS, After Hours Action: VOICEMAIL, Mailbox: 8800). Blended: Allow Closers Y, Closer Campaigns includes PS_INBOUND. Recycling: NA (1800s, 4 max), B (900s, 6 max).
